arts.ttl: Tottenham: Postecoglou drops shock admission regarding summer Ivan Toney chase
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has admitted Tottenham Hotspur did ‘look at’ Ivan Toney in the summer before settling on signing Dominic Solanke. The Lilywhites made finally replacing Harry Kane their top priority this summer after battling through the 2023/24 season without an outright No.9. Spurs were linked with several high-profile strikers, including England international Toney, who was […] The post Tottenham: Postecoglou drops shock admission regarding summer Ivan Toney chase appeared first on CaughtOffside.
